marketName: Fluid Power Cylinder and Actuator Manufacturing
coreJobStatement: Enable controlled linear force and displacement in machines and infrastructure by converting pressurized fluid energy into repeatable, measurable stroke and load
outputTypes: Welded hydraulic cylinders (53% share) — heavy-duty, custom bore; construction/industrial
Tie-rod hydraulic cylinders (22%) — standard light-medium duty; industrial
Mill-type / heavy-duty cylinders (12%) — forged bodies; mining, press, steel mill
Telescopic hydraulic cylinders (8%) — multi-stage; dump trucks, cranes
Pneumatic cylinders / linear actuators (5%) — lower pressure; light industrial
hierarchy: Product VN (L7 through L4) — what process steps and equipment compose the hydraulic cylinder manufacturing chain
marketSize: USD 16.2B global (2025); 5.98% CAGR to USD 21.7B by 2030. Double-acting segment 71.4% revenue share. Welded segment 53.4% revenue share. [SRC: web_search]

l6Systems.name: Input Material & Blank Supply
l6Systems.jobFamily: Source and qualify steel bar/tube blanks, seal kits, and forgings to cylinder design spec

l6Systems.name: Bore Preparation
l6Systems.jobFamily: Finish cylinder tube inner diameter to Ra <= 0.4 um for dynamic seal running surface

l6Systems.name: Piston Rod Fabrication
l6Systems.jobFamily: Grind and surface-treat piston rod to final OD tolerance and corrosion resistance

l6Systems.name: Component Machining
l6Systems.jobFamily: Machine end caps, pistons, flanges, and ports to design tolerances

l6Systems.name: Seal & Accessory Kitting
l6Systems.jobFamily: Assemble and qualify seal stacks, wipers, and static seals for pressure rating

l6Systems.name: Cylinder Assembly
l6Systems.jobFamily: Assemble barrel, rod, piston, and end components into pressure-rated unit

l6Systems.name: Testing & Validation
l6Systems.jobFamily: Pressure-cycle, stroke, and leakage test completed cylinder to design spec

l6Systems.name: Finishing & Dispatch
l6Systems.jobFamily: Apply corrosion protection, mark, and package cylinder for delivery

l6Systems.name: Quality Assurance & Metrology
l6Systems.jobFamily: Dimensional, pressure, surface compliance across all core steps

l6Systems.name: Engineering & Application Design
l6Systems.jobFamily: Custom cylinder specification, FEA analysis, application engineering

vnUnits.name: Precision Steel Bar / Rod Blank
vnUnits.functionalJob: Cold-drawn precision round bar (C45 / 42CrMo4) for piston rod blanks. ZOLLERN PRIMARY POSITION. 65% share of rod blank input.

vnUnits.name: Cylinder Tube Blank
vnUnits.functionalJob: Cold-drawn seamless + honed tube (60% share), skived & roller-burnished tube (30%), welded-drawn tube (10%).

vnUnits.name: End-Cap / Flange Blank
vnUnits.functionalJob: Die-forged steel blank (55%), bar-stock blank (30%), nodular iron casting (15%). ZOLLERN SECONDARY POSITION at bar-stock blank.

vnUnits.name: Seal & O-Ring Set
vnUnits.functionalJob: Polyurethane / PTFE dynamic seal sets (Parker, Trelleborg, Freudenberg, SKF) — 65% share.

vnUnits.name: Bore Finishing Machine
vnUnits.functionalJob: Skiving & roller burnishing (45%), honing machine (40%), precision boring + honing (15%).

vnUnits.name: Cylindrical Grinding Machine
vnUnits.functionalJob: Precision OD grinding of piston rod to ISO f7 tolerance before chrome plating.

vnUnits.name: Hard Chrome Plating Line
vnUnits.functionalJob: Electroplating of piston rod surface to 20-50 um chrome thickness for corrosion and wear resistance.

strategicPosition: ZOLLERN supplies precision cold-drawn bar at IT8 tolerance (+-0.02 mm) with in-line IH up to 64 HRC. Position at L5 (Precision Steel Bar / Rod Blank) under L6a (Input Material & Blank Supply). Also SECONDARY position at L5 End-Cap / Flange Blank. ANCILLARY position via EN 10204 3.1 material certification.

sources.label: NAICS 333995 — Fluid Power Cylinder and Actuator Manufacturing
